subject: Project meeting schedule for Friday
body_text: Hi team, please join the project meeting this Friday at 10 AM in the lab. We will review the Week 14 progress and assign next steps.
rationale: Legitimate scheduling email with no suspicious request.

subject: Book reservation is ready for pickup
body_text: The book you reserved is available at the main library circulation desk. Please pick it up within seven days using your student ID card.
rationale: Expected library notification with ordinary account link.

subject: Database homework feedback released
body_text: Feedback for homework 3 has been released on the course platform. Please review the comments before the next lab session.
rationale: Course update without pressure, credential request, or attachment risk.

subject: Receipt for your textbook order
body_text: Thank you for your order. Your receipt is included below. The textbook will be shipped to the campus store for pickup next week.
rationale: Expected purchase receipt with benign attachment name.

subject: Volunteer signup for Saturday workshop
body_text: We need two volunteers for the robotics workshop on Saturday. Please reply if you can help with setup from 8 AM to 9 AM.

subject: Interview confirmation
body_text: This message confirms your interview on Monday at 2 PM. The meeting link will be sent from the same address one hour before the interview.

subject: Workshop registration confirmed
body_text: Your registration for the security workshop has been confirmed. Please bring your laptop and arrive ten minutes before the opening session.

subject: Paper discussion notes
body_text: Attached are the notes from today's paper discussion. Please read section 4 before our next meeting.
rationale: Academic follow-up with expected document attachment.

subject: Scheduled wireless maintenance
body_text: Campus wireless service may be unavailable from 1 AM to 3 AM on Sunday due to scheduled maintenance. No action is required from users.
rationale: Informational IT notice with no credential request.

subject: Updated project task list
body_text: I updated the shared task list after our meeting. Please check your assigned items before Wednesday and leave comments if anything is unclear.

subject: Monthly invoice available
body_text: Your monthly cloud lab invoice is available in the billing portal. The payment method on file will be charged automatically on June 5.
rationale: Legitimate invoice notification without urgent pressure or suspicious domain.

subject: Reminder: thesis proposal rehearsal
body_text: This is a calendar reminder for thesis proposal rehearsal tomorrow at 3 PM in room 402. Please bring printed slides if needed.

subject: Course add deadline reminder
body_text: The course add deadline is Friday at 5 PM. Please review your enrollment status in the student portal before the deadline.

subject: Lab access card pickup
body_text: Your lab access card is ready for pickup at the department office. Please bring your student ID during office hours.

subject: Accepted poster presentation details
body_text: Your poster presentation has been accepted. Please upload the final poster file by next Monday using the conference submission page.

subject: Teaching assistant training reminder
body_text: This is a reminder that teaching assistant training begins at 9 AM tomorrow in the learning center auditorium.

subject: Tuition payment receipt
body_text: Your tuition payment has been received. The official receipt is available in the student finance portal.

subject: Dataset review notes
body_text: I reviewed the sample labels and left comments on three borderline spam examples. Please check the shared document when you have time.

subject: Building air conditioning maintenance
body_text: Air conditioning maintenance is scheduled for the engineering building this Saturday morning. Offices may be warmer than usual.

subject: IRB office hour schedule
body_text: The research office will hold IRB consultation hours on Wednesday afternoon. Appointments can be reserved through the office website.

subject: Cloud lab maintenance completed
body_text: The scheduled cloud lab maintenance has been completed. All virtual machines are available again.

subject: Dormitory package notification
body_text: A package addressed to you has arrived at the dormitory front desk. Please pick it up before 10 PM.

subject: Weekly research check-in
body_text: Let's keep our weekly research check-in at 4 PM on Thursday. Please bring the latest experiment notes.

subject: Assignment deadline extended
body_text: The assignment 4 deadline has been extended by two days. The new deadline is Sunday at 11:59 PM.

subject: Print quota balance update
body_text: Your monthly print quota has been updated. You can view the current balance in the campus printing portal.

subject: Alumni panel registration confirmed
body_text: Your registration for the alumni career panel is confirmed. The event will be held online next Tuesday evening.

subject: Software license renewal notice
body_text: The university software license server will renew student licenses automatically this weekend. No action is required.

subject: Exam room assignment
body_text: Your exam room assignment for the final exam is room 205 in the engineering building. Please arrive ten minutes early.

subject: Slides for tomorrow's rehearsal
body_text: I uploaded the draft slides for tomorrow's rehearsal. Please review the experiment overview section before the meeting.

subject: Annual security awareness training
body_text: Annual security awareness training opens next week. The training is informational and does not require password changes.
